posts.text: A legend. We met in Baghdad in 2003 as US troops were invading.  His voice would be important today.  He’d be skeptical I suspect of where things are going now, and undoubtedly asking hard questions. .John F. Burns, Prize-winning Foreign Correspondent for The Times, Dies at 81 nytimes.com/2026/03/13/world… via @NYTimes
